classifications.subject: 🧠 Microsoft Builds Its Agent Stack
classifications.reason: Directly covers Microsoft's AI agent stack architecture — core wiki topic on AI agents, frameworks, and enterprise agent deployment. Microsoft Build 2026 context makes this highly timely.

classifications.subject: ⚡️Satya Nadella: No Priors x Latent Space Crossover Special at Microsoft Build
classifications.reason: Podcast interview with Satya Nadella at Microsoft Build 2026, featuring swyx (No Priors × Latent Space crossover). Directly relevant to AI strategy, agent ecosystem, and enterprise AI direction. Latent Space is a key tracked blog.

classifications.subject: To Boldly Go: The Case for Space Datacenters
classifications.reason: SemiAnalysis article on space-based datacenters for AI compute. Relevant to AI infrastructure, compute supply chain, and novel approaches to scaling inference/training. SemiAnalysis is a high-signal source for AI infra analysis.

classifications.subject: 🔬Scaling Past Informal AI - Carina Hong, Axiom Math
classifications.reason: Interview with Carina Hong of Axiom Math on formal AI reasoning and scaling beyond informal AI. Relevant to AI reasoning, formal verification, and mathematical AI — active frontier in LLM research. Latent Space/No Priors source.

classifications.subject: [AINews] Reve 2 and Ideogram 4: Layouts in Imagegen
classifications.reason: AINews coverage of two new image generation models (Reve 2, Ideogram 4) with layout control capabilities. Relevant to AI image generation as a rapidly evolving domain. swyx/AINews is a core tracked source.
